headline: Retroactive Tax Claims (up to 3 years) Preparation Checklist — Scottsdale
articleBody:
Retroactive Tax Claims (up to 3 years) Preparation Checklist for Scottsdale Clients

Before your Retroactive Tax Claims (up to 3 years) appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
